# Design System Template
## Blank template for saving P02 output — one per project

> Copy to `projects/{CLIENT-NAME}/design-system.md`
> Populated by P02 prompt output. Do not hand-edit tokens without re-running P05.

/* Border */

--color-border-strong:     oklch();

/* Semantic */

--color-warning:           oklch();
--color-error:             oklch();
